title: Tritium Fuel Deposited
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS deposits FROM CarrierDepositFuel WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} unit(s) of tritium deposited across {deposits} fuelling event(s) during the report period. Tritium is the lifeblood of carrier mobility — the cumulative amount deposited represents an enormous investment of either your own mining time at a tritium hotspot or serious credit spending at market prices.
details.help: CarrierDepositFuel fires when tritium is loaded into a fleet carrier's fuel reserve. total drives the title as the fuel volume headline.

tagLines: Fleet carrier tritium fuel logs compiled. Fuel reserve replenishment activity noted in the operations record.
Tritium doesn't find itself. Every unit in this total was either mined or bought.
A carrier without fuel doesn't jump. You kept yours moving. That took effort and credits.
